title: Gebiym #1374
definition:
Gebim = "cisterns"

 1) a village north of Jerusalem apparently between Anathoth (modern
     Anata) and the ridge on which Nob was situated
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gebim = "cisterns"

 1) a village north of Jerusalem apparently between Anathoth (modern
     Anata) and the ridge on which Nob was situated

    NASB:  trenches, a place N. of Jer.
